rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN P ELLIOTT VS. ZACHARY SHAFFER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 26, 2018, Line 1. DEFENDANTS SHANG CHIANG, HELEN FANG'S MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. GRANTED without leave to amend as to prayer paragraphs 3, 4, and 5. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN P ELLIOTT VS. ZACHARY SHAFFER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 26, 2018, Line 1. DEFENDANTS SHANG CHIANG, HELEN FANG'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege any basis for contractual liability, e.g. contract between Plaintiff and owners, etc. Hearing Required to address why an OSC re: Contempt shall not be issued for Plaintiff's Counsel's failure to comply with CCP 430.41. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFERSON CHRISMAN VS. HOWARD LEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 26, 2018, Line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT JEFFERSON CHRISMAN'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT. OVERRULED. Cross-complaint sufficiently alleges causes of action for common count and interference with prospective economic relations. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JEFFERSON CHRISMAN VS. HOWARD LEE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 26, 2018, Line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT JEFFERSON CHRISMAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT. GRANTED with leave to amend to allege facts giving rise to contract-based attorney's fees. Cross-Complainant fails to cite any authority for the proposition that statutory attorneys fees under SFRO are applicable to non-SFRO causes of action alleged by the cross-complainant in the cross-complaint. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION , AS TRUSTEE, VS. LINDA CATRON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion & Motion To Authoizing Substitution Of Real Party In Interest For Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 26, 2018, Line 4. REAL PARTY IN INTEREST 2614 SACRAMENTO STREET, LLC'S Motion To Authoizing Substitution Of Real Party In Interest For Plaintiff. GRANTED. 2614 Sacrament Street, LLC shall be substituted in as Plaintiff. No other relief is sought according to the Notice of Motion. 2614 Sacramento, LLC's right to enforce the judgment for possession and/or money is not properly before this Court. See Notice of Motion. =(501/REQ)
